# Make expert-group indices unique in place

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_deepseek_manual.py; do not edit. -->

This mixture-of-experts translation keeps routing scores, indices, counts, and expert values in tile operations.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Upstream module | [`tile_kernels/moe/inplace_unique_group_indices_kernel.py`](https://github.com/deepseek-ai/TileKernels/blob/36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5/tile_kernels/moe/inplace_unique_group_indices_kernel.py) |
| Pinned revision | `36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5` |
| C++ function | `inplace_unique_group_indices` |
| Verification | `source-validated` |
| Minimum thread fragment | 128 bytes |

## Core C++ kernel

```cpp title="inplace_unique_group_indices_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
template <int NumTokens, int NumTopk, int TileN = 8>
void inplace_unique_group_indices(std::int32_t *group_indices) {
    static_assert(NumTokens > 0 && NumTopk > 0, "dim must be positive");
    static_assert(NumTopk % 8 == 0 && TileN % 8 == 0, "NumTopk/TileN must be multiple of 8");
    constexpr int kTN = NumTokens / TileN;
    using namespace pto;
    using gm = global_tensor<std::int32_t, RowMajor<NumTokens, NumTopk>>;
    using tile_full = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileN, NumTopk, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_col = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileN, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, TileN, 1>;
    using it = global_iterator<gm, tile_full>;
    it idx_iter(group_indices);
    for (int tn = 0; tn < kTN; ++tn) {
        auto gidx = idx_iter(tn, 0);
        tile_full idx; TLOAD(idx, gidx);
        tile_col neg; TEXPANDS(neg, -1);
        for (int b = 1; b < NumTopk; ++b) {
            for (int a = 0; a < b; ++a) {
                tile_col ca, cb, eq;
                TEXTRACT(ca, idx, 0, a);
                TEXTRACT(cb, idx, 0, b);
                TCMP(eq, ca, cb);
                TSEL(cb, eq, neg);
                TINSERT(idx, cb, 0, b);
            }
        }
        auto gout = idx_iter(tn, 0);
        TSTORE(gout, idx);
    }
}
```

## Algorithm walkthrough

Load a routing fragment, apply selection, counting, normalization, gather, or reduction stages, and store the fragment in token-major or expert-major order.

## Source-to-intrinsic mapping

[`TCMP`](../../../intrinsics/tcmp.md), [`TEXPANDS`](../../../intrinsics/texpands.md), [`TEXTRACT`](../../../intrinsics/textract.md), [`TINSERT`](../../../intrinsics/tinsert.md), [`TLOAD`](../../../intrinsics/tload.md), [`TSEL`](../../../intrinsics/tsel.md), [`TSTORE`](../../../intrinsics/tstore.md)

Scalar C++ controls dimensions, loop bounds, and tile coordinates. Tensor
values remain in global tensor views and typed tiles throughout the data path.

## Block and thread partition

Blocks partition tokens or experts; threads own disjoint routing fragments of at least 128 bytes and derive their coordinates from execution identity.

## Memory and tile flow

Scores and indices are loaded into typed tiles, transformed through the routing pipeline, and committed through regular or indexed tile memory operations.

## Build and verification

Run the migration gate from the repository root:

```console
python3 scripts/verify_deepseek_migration.py
```

The verification label records the strongest completed gate. A
`source-validated` page is a valid API example even when compiler lowering
for one of its public intrinsics is not yet available.

    namespace supernpu::tile_isa {

    template <int NumTokens, int NumTopk, int TileN = 8>
    void inplace_unique_group_indices(std::int32_t *group_indices) {
        static_assert(NumTokens > 0 && NumTopk > 0, "dim must be positive");
        static_assert(NumTopk % 8 == 0 && TileN % 8 == 0, "NumTopk/TileN must be multiple of 8");
        constexpr int kTN = NumTokens / TileN;
        using namespace pto;
        using gm = global_tensor<std::int32_t, RowMajor<NumTokens, NumTopk>>;
        using tile_full = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileN, NumTopk, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_col = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileN, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, TileN, 1>;
        using it = global_iterator<gm, tile_full>;
        it idx_iter(group_indices);
        for (int tn = 0; tn < kTN; ++tn) {
            auto gidx = idx_iter(tn, 0);
            tile_full idx; TLOAD(idx, gidx);
            tile_col neg; TEXPANDS(neg, -1);
            for (int b = 1; b < NumTopk; ++b) {
                for (int a = 0; a < b; ++a) {
                    tile_col ca, cb, eq;
                    TEXTRACT(ca, idx, 0, a);
                    TEXTRACT(cb, idx, 0, b);
                    TCMP(eq, ca, cb);
                    TSEL(cb, eq, neg);
                    TINSERT(idx, cb, 0, b);
                }
            }
            auto gout = idx_iter(tn, 0);
            TSTORE(gout, idx);
        }
    }

    }
